creator: trhodes@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, 20 Dec 2002 15:33:39 -0700
John E Hein <jhein@timing.com> wrote:

> Tom Rhodes wrote at 14:05 -0800 on Dec 20:

>  > 
>  > State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
>  > State-Changed-By: trhodes
>  > State-Changed-When: Fri Dec 20 14:04:37 PST 2002
>  > State-Changed-Why: 
>  > The manual page documents the -R option now.
>  > 
>  > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=31210
> 
> The PR was for the info page, not the man page.
> The man page has documented -R for quite a while now.
> 

I've just emailed peter about this, I honestly don't think we are
capable of reworking the info files...

--
Tom Rhodes
